comments.vite: Pinned to 7 because @scala-js/vite-plugin-scalajs supports vite '4.1.4 - 7'; using 8 forced a duplicate nested vite.
comments.overrides: Force esbuild to the patched 0.28.1 across the tree (vite 7 pins esbuild ^0.27.0, which is vulnerable to GHSA-gv7w-rqvm-qjhr / GHSA-g7r4-m6w7-qqqr).
